title: prioritize_validation_queue data payload
description: v0.21.0 active-learning ranker for the manual-review backlog. Pulls candidates from three streams — find_anomalous_tablets (bi-orphans / lex-singletons / thematic-orphans), find_isolate_compositions, and corpus-wide chunk-discovery surfaces — and scores each by *information gain from human review*. Rewards chunk-relationships, anomaly-membership, and missing metadata; penalizes settled clusters, already-curated tablets, and tablets so isolated review yields nothing. Each entry carries a `reasons[]` array spelling out which scoring terms fired. Wrapped in StructuredEnvelope.

scope.description: Candidate-stream selector. 'bi_orphans' pulls from find_anomalous_tablets + find_isolate_compositions. 'chunk_discoveries' pulls from corpus-wide chunk-index hosts. 'all' unions both.

top_k.description: Number of ranked entries to return.

min_score.description: If set, drop entries whose score is below this floor. null means return all top_k regardless of score.

score.description: Sum of REWARD terms (chunk-hosts, anomaly seeds, missing metadata, anomaly-kind count) minus PENALTY terms (settled cluster, curated-and-well-chunked, truly-isolated). Higher = higher review priority.

reasons.description: Human-readable explanations of which scoring terms fired for this entry. Transparency is the point — Dane should be able to see WHY a tablet ranks where it does.

chunk_host_count.description: Distinct length-20 chunks (corpus-wide hash-index entries) in which this tablet appears as an occurrence.

anomaly_kind.description: Comma-joined list of anomaly flags that fire for this tablet (e.g. 'bi_orphan,genre_misfit'). Empty string when none fire.

metadata_status.description: 'missing' = never queried, 'null' = queried with empty/404 result, 'partial' = has metadata but missing period or genre, 'complete' = period AND genre populated.

cluster_membership.description: Size of the lexical cluster (connected component in the trigram-Jaccard graph) this tablet sits in, or null if not in the lex graph.

sign_count.description: Sign-token count from the anomaly index, or null if the tablet isn't there.

candidates_considered.description: Distinct tablet IDs unioned across all enabled seed streams before scoring.

bi_orphan_seeds.description: Distinct tablets pulled from find_anomalous_tablets across bi_orphan + lex_singleton + thematic_orphan kinds.

chunk_discovery_seeds.description: Distinct tablets with ≥1 chunk-host occurrence after the seed-enumeration sweep.
